task_completion.description: Select the 'Attention Is All You Need' paper in Zotero.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The paper titled 'Attention Is All You Need' is highlighted/selected in the main Zotero item list.

task_completion.description: Attach the tensor2tensor GitHub URL to the Attention paper.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box (such as 'Enter URI' or 'Attach Link to URI') containing 'https://github.com/tensorflow/tensor2tensor' is visible, or the URL is shown in the right-hand info pane for a link attachment under the Attention paper.
The paper titled 'BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding' is highlighted/selected in the main Zotero item list.

task_completion.description: Attach the bert GitHub URL to the BERT paper.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box containing 'https://github.com/google-research/bert' is visible, or the URL is shown in the right-hand info pane for a link attachment under the BERT paper.

task_completion.description: Select the 'Deep Residual Learning' paper in Zotero.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The paper titled 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' is highlighted/selected in the main Zotero item list.

task_completion.description: Attach the deep-residual-networks GitHub URL to the ResNet paper.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box containing 'https://github.com/KaimingHe/deep-residual-networks' is visible, or the URL is shown in the right-hand info pane for a link attachment under the Deep Residual Learning paper.

integrity.description: The agent must use the Zotero GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through Zotero menus (e.g., right-click context menu -> Add Attachment -> Attach Link to URI, or using the paperclip icon) rather than executing terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The URLs must be added as link attachments, not as text in other metadata fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URLs should be entered into a URI/URL attachment dialog, not pasted into the 'Abstract', 'Extra', or 'Notes' fields in the right-hand pane.

integrity.description: The agent interacts with the actual Zotero application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Zotero application window is visible and actively being used; the agent is not just typing the pairs into a notepad, text editor, or web browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target 1: 'Attention Is All You Need' requires URL 'https://github.com/tensorflow/tensor2tensor'. Target 2: 'BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding' requires URL 'https://github.com/google-research/bert'. Target 3: 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' requires URL 'https://github.com/KaimingHe/deep-residual-networks'.
